preset_description: Dark = substance signal. Spotlights product capabilities and metrics. CTA and pricing are understated — features are the story, not conversion pressure.

brief.audience: Startups needing an AI-ready design system

accent_tokens._note: Brand primary CTA color. Global — not per-preset. Two variants: button on a light/neutral section vs. on a dark section.

beats.name: Orientation
beats.rationale: Establishes context first: identifies startups as the audience, introduces MODE as an AI-ready design system, and frames the problem space. Essential for awareness-stage visitors arriving organically who need immediate clarity on what this is and whether it's for them.

beats.name: Credibility
beats.rationale: Validator archetype demands proof early. Placing trust signals—startup customer logos, partner badges, community size—right after orientation satisfies the Validator's need to confirm legitimacy before investing attention in feature details.

beats.name: Value
beats.rationale: Now that credibility is established, articulate what MODE actually delivers: AI-ready components, rapid prototyping, design-to-code workflows. At awareness stage this stays benefit-oriented rather than exhaustive, showing outcomes startups care about (speed, scalability, AI integration).

beats.name: Evidence
beats.rationale: Validator archetype requires concrete proof. Present metrics—time saved, adoption stats, brief case study snippets from startup customers—to substantiate the value claims just made. This beat converts skepticism into confidence without pushing a hard sell.

beats.name: Conversion
beats.rationale: Awareness-stage conversion should be soft: a free trial signup, newsletter, or 'explore the system' CTA rather than a purchase commitment. Positioned after evidence so the Validator feels sufficiently validated before being asked to act. No Decision beat per awareness-stage rules.

beats.name: Recovery
beats.rationale: Final beat provides secondary engagement paths—docs, community, blog, social links—for visitors not ready to convert. Catches exit intent and keeps the relationship open, critical for awareness-stage organic visitors who may need multiple touchpoints.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.rationale: Global navigation — wayfinding and persistent CTA for the session.

sections.name: Hero
sections.rationale: Establishes context first: identifies startups as the audience, introduces MODE as an AI-ready design system, and frames the problem space. Essential for awareness-stage visitors arriving organically who need immediate clarity on what this is and whether it's for them.

sections.name: Social proof
sections.rationale: Validator archetype demands proof early. Placing trust signals—startup customer logos, partner badges, community size—right after orientation satisfies the Validator's need to confirm legitimacy before investing attention in feature details.

sections.name: Footer
sections.rationale: Page close — brand mark, minimal navigation, and legal.

page.reasoning: Awareness stage calls for 'full for exploration and top-funnel pages' to support organic discovery and wayfinding context without conversion pressure.

Awareness funnel stage prefers 'editorial variant is the high-expression awareness layout', and Validator archetype requires 'Validator variant always includes trust_signal' — with-social-proof satisfies both by combining awareness-stage expression with credibility anchoring.

slots.headline: Your design system knows how to render. MODE teaches it why.
slots.subhead: MODE is the semantic layer above your component library — resolving behavior, visual emphasis, and copy register to the right experience for every user, funnel stage, and context. No manual variants. No QA overhead.
slots.trust_signal: Lifetime access — no subscription, no lock-in

page.reasoning: Validator archetype prefers variants containing 'with-source' and the notes specify 'Validator variant leads with quote, logos below' for credibility-first positioning appropriate to organic awareness building.

slots.headline: Built for teams that move in code
slots.quote: We shipped three funnel variants in the time it used to take us to spec one. The resolution engine just makes the right call.

page.reasoning: Awareness stage does not require conversion-recovery, so 'standard is the default' provides appropriate closure without aggressive re-engagement tactics.
